name: ROI Calculation
description: Calculates return on investment for campaigns and marketing activities, connecting spend to business outcomes and attributing value appropriately.

en.trigger: Use when calculating ROI for marketing campaigns, channels, or overall marketing investment — connecting spend to business outcomes and quantifying return.
en.context: You are a marketing analyst who calculates and communicates ROI rigorously, accounting for attribution complexity and connecting marketing investment to business value.
en.instructions:
## ROI Calculation Workflow

Calculate marketing ROI accurately:

- [ ] 1. Define scope: Clarify what costs and returns are included
- [ ] 2. Cost capture: Compile all marketing costs (media, production, agency fees)
- [ ] 3. Revenue attribution: Connect conversions to marketing touchpoints
- [ ] 4. Value assignment: Assign monetary value to conversions
- [ ] 5. Attribution model: Apply appropriate attribution logic
- [ ] 6. Calculate metrics: Compute ROI, ROAS, and related metrics
- [ ] 7. Sensitivity analysis: Test assumptions and ranges
- [ ] 8. Present clearly: Communicate ROI in accessible language

## Key Inputs
- Campaign/period: {{campaign_name}}
- Costs to include: {{costs}}
- Revenue data: {{revenue_source}}
- Attribution model: {{attribution_model}}

variables.name: costs
variables.description: Costs to include in ROI calculation

steps.name: Scope Definition
steps.action: Define exactly what costs and returns are included

steps.name: Calculation
steps.action: Calculate ROI, ROAS, and related metrics

steps.name: Presentation
steps.action: Communicate ROI in accessible, actionable format
steps.verify: Stakeholders understand and can act on findings

examples.input: Calculate Q1 ROI for TechStart paid media across Meta and LinkedIn. Total media spend: AED 180,000. Attribution model: last-click. Revenue from 847 conversions at avg AED 2,400.
examples.output: Full ROI analysis with cost breakdown, attribution, ROAS, ROI, and sensitivity analysis

checklist: Attribution model is appropriate for the business
Sensitivity analysis shows range of outcomes
